config.name: Project name
config.draftRestorePrompt: You have an unsaved draft. Restore?
config.uploadDropHint: Drop a file or click to choose
config.headerRowHint: Click any row to set as header
config.headerRowBanner: Click any row in the table below to set it as the header row

preview.title: Preview
preview.truncated: Results truncated — showing only the first rows

hint.no_columns: Pick a sheet and header row for your sources first

mapping.cellAddressHint: Must be an Excel address, e.g. A3

modeHint.source: Pull the value from a column in the source file
modeHint.source_cell: Read from a fixed cell in the source file (e.g. A3)
modeHint.literal: Fill every output row with the same static value

batch.primarySlotHint: Multiple files allowed; one output per file
batch.lookupSlotHint: Single file, shared by all primaries

overwriteConfig.title: Overwrite Config
overwriteConfig.description: A config with this name already exists. Are you sure you want to overwrite it?

deleteConfig.title: Delete Config
deleteConfig.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

cancelJob.title: Cancel Job
cancelJob.description: Are you sure you want to cancel this job? This action cannot be undone.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please contact support.
errors.invalidName: Project name may contain letters/digits/underscore/hyphen/space, 1–80 chars

err.cellAddress: Cell address format is incorrect, e.g. A3
err.xorMode: Only one fill mode may be selected (source field / fixed cell / literal value)
err.requireOneMode: Please choose a fill mode: source field, fixed cell, or literal value
err.invalidName: Project name may contain letters/digits/underscore/hyphen/space, 1–80 chars
err.duplicateAlias: Duplicate source alias — each source must have a unique alias
err.noPrimary: At least one source with the "primary" role is required
err.aliasDuplicate: This alias is already used by another source; choose a different name
err.columnNotInSource: This column is not in source "{{alias}}"'s column list

mobile.title: Please use a desktop browser
mobile.body: Configuration requires more screen space — please open on a desktop or laptop.
